lastSyncedNote: Added 6.6.1 features after release: lock screen leaderboard (Tournaments, Leagues & Societies, Simulator Leagues), plays-like distances with elevation/weather/lie (Casual Rounds), admin activity feed and audit log (Leagues & Societies, Clubs), and embed your live leaderboard on your website (Leagues & Societies, Clubs). Lock screen leaderboard intentionally skipped on Casual Rounds (no tournament leaderboard there). SHA pinned to 5ca97c8e (the Release 6.6.1 (661) commit).
